customer_name: State University of New York College at Oneonta

citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care.
citations.narrative:
The current Attending veterinarian took on the role at the facility in September 2025 , however, the program of veterinary
care document contains the information pertaining to the previous AV. The PVC document must be updated to reflect the
information pertaining to the Attending Veterinarian overseeing the facility and must include the required information per
this section. The facility must correct this issue.
********Correct by April 1, 2026

The documentation of a contingency plan for the facility has not been completed. Research facilities must develop and
document a contingency plan pertaining to their facility, which would be implemented in the event of an emergency or
disaster. In addition, this document must be reviewed on an annual basis with documentation of those reviews in order to
ensure it adequately addresses the criteria listed in this section.
*********Correct by April 1, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.33(a)(1) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care. 
The current Attending veterinarian took on the role at the facility in September 2025 , however, the program of veterinary 
care document contains the information pertaining to the previous AV. The PVC document must be updated to reflect the 
information pertaining to the Attending Veterinarian overseeing the facility and must include the required information per 
this section. The facility must correct this issue.  
********Correct by April 1, 2026 
2.38(l) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
The documentation of a contingency plan for the facility has not been completed. Research facilities must develop and 
document a contingency plan pertaining to their facility, which would be implemented in the event of an emergency or 
disaster. In addition, this document must be reviewed on an annual basis with documentation of those reviews in order to 
ensure it adequately addresses the criteria listed in this section. 
*********Correct by April 1, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
 n
